series_metadata.series_description: Sales ratio reports provide statistical data pertaining to sales of real estate in Ohio''''''''s counties and are used for real property assessment equalization by the Ohio Department of Taxation.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Sales ratio reports prepared for sexennial reappraisals are to be maintained by the Ohio Department of Taxation until June 1 of the year following the next sexennial reappraisal, then deleted Sales ratio reports prepared for triennial updates are to be maintained until June 1 of the year following the next triennial update, then deleted. ; Paper: Sales ratio reports prepared for sexennial reappraisals are to be maintained by the Ohio Department of Taxation until June 1 of the year following the next sexennial reappraisal, then destroyed. Sales ratio reports prepared for triennial updates are to be maintained until June 1 of the year following the next triennial update, then destroyed. Retain for 6 months after scanned., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
